zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor於大約1250年出生在英國素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利時，她的父親Hugh de Windsor27歲，母親Godeholde de St John27歲。她於大約1270年與Sir Ralph de Berners在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在英國英格蘭素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor was born about 1250, in West Horsley, Surrey, England, her father, Hugh de Windsor, was 27 and her mother, Godeholde de St John, was 27. She married Sir Ralph de Berners about 1270, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1300, in West Horsley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor est née environ 1250, à West Horsley, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Windsor, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Godeholde de St John, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph de Berners environ 1270, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1300, à West Horsley, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Christiana FitzHugh de Windsorが約1250年にイギリススリーウエスト ホールスリーで生まれた時，父Hugh de Windsorは27歳，母Godeholde de St Johnは27歳であった。約1270年にイギリスでSir Ralph de Bernersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年にイギリスイギリススリーウエスト ホールスリーで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 수리 웨스트 호르슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Windsor(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Godeholde de St John(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1270년 영국에서 Sir Ralph de Berners(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 웨스트 호르슬리에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana FitzHugh de Windsor родилась около 1250 г. в местности вест хаурсли, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Windsor было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Godeholde de St John, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph de Berners около 1270 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности вест хаурсли, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
